name: eval-teammates-br
description: jaxaht/eval-teammates-br dataset hosted on Hugging Face and contributed by the HF Datasets community
rai:dataLimitations: This evaluation teammate best-response set are only best-responses to their counterpart agents in the jaxaht/eval-teammates dataset. Moreover, they are only applicable for the specific environments specified by the name of the directory each agent is located in.
rai:dataBiases: This evaluation teammate best-response set was constructed entirely from the teammates provided in the jaxaht/eval-teammates dataset. Therefore, the best-responses provided here are only representative of the evaluation teammates in the other dataset.
rai:dataUseCases: This evaluation teammate best-response set is used to evaluate the diversity of the evaluation teammates found in the jaxaht/eval-teammates dataset. Validity has been established through two tasks: (1) generating cross-play matrices of the set of evaluation teammates playing against the set of best-responses and (2) computing the best-response returns. Validity has not been established in any other context.
